channel.title: barefoot___wanderer
channel.description: DIY ЁЯкЪ Building my own container house тЪТя╕П Owner Builder Learning as I go ЁЯТк

item.title: What you may not realise is тАж This whole owner builder journey...
item.description:
View on TikTok


What you may not realise is тАж This whole owner builder journey IтАЩm on was a massive risk, it was an all or nothing type deal. I risked everything I had to buy land in a town I had never been to and build a house on a tiny budget that was only possible if I did all the work myself. I took that risk knowing I had no experience, no idea what I was doing and not even a friend/family member I could turn to who was in the trades. I took that risk knowing my entire career had to be put on hold and that getting back into the industry and owning a business like I had may be near on impossible. I took that risk knowing my tiny home build budget may not be enough and I may never be able to afford to complete my dream house. I took that risk knowing my savings wouldnтАЩt cover living costs and I would have to find a way to do that while building. The odds were against me, it was very reasonable to assume I would fail, I had family and friends tell me I was insane and itтАЩs not possible. BUT I had a secret, I am my biggest cheerleader and IтАЩm no gambling woman but I knew betting on myself and going all in was a sure deal. I am a huge believer in тАШthe greater the risk the greater the rewardтАЩ and that you are in the control seat, directing your own life. Its a powerful thing to be able to set a vision of a future so clear that is already feels like itтАЩs reality. To know and believe with your whole being that anything is possible, because of your own lived experience. The mind is a powerful entity that can work with you or against you, if you can learn to use your mind as a tool any ordinary person can achieve extraordinary things. But only if we remain kind to ourselves, kinder than the world or society can be, treat yourself like a toddler learning everyday stuff. There will be falls, fails and tantrums but thatтАЩs okay give yourself a big cuddle and remind yourself that Rome wasnтАЩt built in a day, you canтАЩt grow a forest over night and we donтАЩt come out of the womb running . Evolution of self is not easy but discipline is the key to freedom, and rememberтАж тАж тАШThe moment you doubt whether you can fly, you cease forever to be able to do it!тАЩ

item.title: For those who were wondering what I was saying while I was insta...
item.description:
View on TikTok


For those who were wondering what I was saying while I was installing that shed тАж now you donтАЩt have to wonder ЁЯШЭЁЯШВ Do all building sites sound like this? ЁЯд╖тАНтЩАя╕П

item.title: 99% chance this wasnтАЩt possible? ЁЯЩДЁЯТЕ Give me extremely lo...
item.description:
View on TikTok


99% chance this wasnтАЩt possible? ЁЯЩДЁЯТЕ Give me extremely low odds any day and IтАЩll show you how to beat them! ЁЯТк

item.title: The good old тАЬitтАЩs in good conditionтАЭ marketplace fib ЁЯде...
item.description:
View on TikTok


The good old тАЬitтАЩs in good conditionтАЭ marketplace fib ЁЯде Probably should have picked it up myself but hey I was busy building a house! Safe to say IтАЩve learnt my lesson, always view before buying ЁЯлб It was only $2000AUD so it could still be considered a bargain if you leave out the fact I had to work my ЁЯНС off for it! ЁЯШЭ

WhatтАЩs 700kg of weight when you know how to use leverage to your advantage ЁЯТЕ Ps chat gbt told me the weights so not sure how accurate they are ЁЯдФ

item.title: IтАЩll trade hard work for over 80k in savings any day! IтАЩll n...
item.description:
View on TikTok


IтАЩll trade hard work for over 80k in savings any day! IтАЩll need around 90 logs give or take to make over 1,500 decking boards for my wrap around and roof top deck ЁЯк╡ So I couldnтАЩt be more stoked with this timber mill IтАЩve just scored on sale! It cut the time down from 1-1.5 hours per slab on the chainsaw mill to about 10 minutes ЁЯЩМ ItтАЩs still going to be a massive amount of work but at least it wonтАЩt take a lifetime now ЁЯШН

item.title: This timber mill may be my favourite tool IтАЩve ever bought! ЁЯ...
item.description:
View on TikTok


This timber mill may be my favourite tool IтАЩve ever bought! ЁЯк╡ It packs some serious power and easily eats through the logs where the chainsaw mill struggled! It was taking me around 1.5 hours to mill just one slab with the chainsaw mill and the timber mill only takes 10 minutes! ЁЯШН Decking boards coming soon! ЁЯШЭ

item.title: Just my trusty cheap grinder to the rescue once again armed with...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Just my trusty cheap grinder to the rescue once again armed with a resin fibre disc! ЁЯТ┐ *please note this is an overkill if there isnтАЩt layer after layer of old paint on your windows and not recommended for windows being installed back into where they came from But if you are restoring old windows that donтАЩt need to be a set size this is an absolute game changer! ЁЯОп

item.title: Day 01 of window restoration ЁЯджтАНтЩАя╕П When I was doing rese...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Day 01 of window restoration ЁЯджтАНтЩАя╕П When I was doing research and read it could take a day and a half to restore just one casement I thought yeah right! тАж tell em their dreaming! But I was quickly humbled, itтАЩs no walk in the park and definitely not a jog, this is more like a slow stomach crawl through the parkтАжЁЯЩД тАжslow, painful and youтАЩre probably going to get covered in something thatтАЩs not good for you ЁЯШВ But hey IтАЩve found a way thatтАЩs got me up and running again so my stoked level is 10000000 ЁЯШЭ
